package rulefixtures

// scenario for xml_decoder_without_strict: `xml.NewDecoder(r)` without setting `Strict = false` when processing trusted XML
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule696PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario696Positive(records []Rule696PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
